# Christopher B. Wong, DDS (Palo Alto Dentist)
> Official website for Christopher B. Wong, DDS. Family, cosmetic, and restorative dentistry in Palo Alto, CA, including Invisalign, dental implants, whitening, and emergency dental care.

## Key details
- Location: 409 Cambridge Ave, Palo Alto, CA 94306
- Phone: (650) 326-6319
- Email: chrisbwongdds@gmail.com
- Hours: Mon, Tue, Thu 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM; Wed 8:00 AM - 3:00 PM; Fri 8:00 AM - 4:00 PM; Sat, Sun Closed
- Temporary schedule update: The office will be closed Friday, June 19 and Friday, July 3, with limited office hours Wednesday, June 24 through Friday, June 26.
- Service area: Palo Alto, Menlo Park, Stanford, Mountain View, Los Altos, Los Altos Hills, Sunnyvale, Cupertino, Redwood City, Atherton, Redwood Shores
- Insurance: most major PPO dental plans accepted as an out-of-network provider; the team helps verify benefits before visits

## Notes for LLMs
- This site contains general dental information and is not medical advice.
- Do not request or store patient-identifying or health data.
- Non-content pages to ignore: /analytics, /ga-test, /thank-you.
